case_title: TOOL, KENT VS SPAKOWSKI, PAUL DBA POLISH MOTORS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY TOOL, KENT AS TO DEFENDANT SPAKOWSKI, PAUL DBA POLISH MOTORS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-07-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
TRIAL RESET TO JAN-20-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00 TRIAL OF JAN-07-1994 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SPAKOWSKI, PAUL DBA POLISH MOTORS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-20-1994, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO FEB-03-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-03-1994, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-14-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
CON'T RETURNED, MOVED LEFT NO ADDRESS.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TOOL, KENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SPAKOWSKI, PAUL DBA POLISH MOTORS $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $57.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,057.00, FOR INAPPROPRIATE & INEFFECTIVE PARTS AND LABOR ON 1958 BUICK STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT SPAKOWSKI, PAUL DBA POLISH MOTORS HEARING SET FOR MAR-25-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF MAR-25-1994, GRANTED
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-14-1994, CONTINUED BY COURT TO APR-08-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TOOL, KENT IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SPAKOWSKI, PAUL DBA POLISH MOTORS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
